message:
inventory: bump asupersync runtime inventory to v3 with symbol-level probes

Enhance the runtime inventory generator with three new capabilities:

1. Symbol-level token probing: count call-site occurrences of 11 specific
   API patterns (tokio::spawn, runtime_compat::sleep, smol::block_on,
   asupersync::Cx, etc.) per file, surfacing hotspots that the coarser
   pattern-based classification misses.

2. Workflow inference: heuristic mapping from file paths and content to
   affected user workflow categories (cli-command-execution,
   agent-orchestration-control-plane, pane-output-streaming, etc.)

3. New output fields: `symbol_reference_counts`, `symbol_occurrence_top_files`,
   and `affected_user_workflows` per classification row.

Bump inventory_version from 2 to 3 and regenerate the committed snapshot.

Update the e2e validation test to use the standard structured JSON log
format (emit_log with outcome/decision_path/reason_code/artifact_path)
and add assertions for all new v3 fields: affected_user_workflows array
presence, symbol_reference_counts values, and symbol_occurrence_top_files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
